4-1BB.rationale: 4-1BBL trimerizes 4-1BB at CRD2-3 to cluster it. A CRD1 binder (membrane-distal) leaves that surface free, so ligand-driven clustering proceeds AND the binder adds crosslinking -> superagonism. Urelumab epitope overlaps ligand by only 1 residue.
4-1BB.avoid_rationale: these are the 4-1BBL clustering interface (CRD2-3) — binding here = ligand-blocking utomilumab mode = weaker agonist

CD27.rationale: Unlike 4-1BB, the validated clinical CD27 agonist (varlilumab) binds AT the CD70 site (CRD2-3) and MIMICS CD70. For CD27, ligand-competitive IS the agonist mode. So here the CD70 interface IS the correct target.
CD27.avoid_rationale: none — ligand-site binding is the intended (agonist) mode for CD27
